rationale: No conflict. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §51.258, which governs compliance and penalties for postsecondary sexual assault programs.
quote: Sec. 51.258. COMPLIANCE. (a) The chief executive officer of each postsecondary educational institution shall annually certify in writing to the coordinating board that the institution is in substantial compliance with this subchapter.
_note: The cited rule concerns postsecondary institutional compliance with sexual assault program requirements; it has no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
